settings.title: Ribbon Folder Settings
settings.description: Create groups and display them as buttons on the Ribbon that open menus with commands or notes.

iconFolder.name: Icon Folder
iconFolder.description: Custom icon root directory. Icons can be Lucide names (e.g., dice), .svg files relative to this directory (e.g., add.svg), or full paths within your vault.

addFolder.name: New Group
addFolder.description: Add a new button group to the Ribbon

settings.groupsListDescription: Click group rows to expand/collapse; drag handles to reorder groups.

noteOpenLocation.name: Open notes from menu in
noteOpenLocation.description: Where to open a note when you click it in a Ribbon Folder menu.

folder.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the group "{{name}}"?
folder.name: Name
folder.iconDescription: Lucide name (e.g., folder) or .svg path; click "Select SVG" to choose from icon folder
folder.menuDisplayDescription: How commands are displayed in the menu
folder.triggerModeDescription: Display menu when clicking or hovering the group icon

edit.title: Edit Command
edit.displayDescription: Name displayed in menu (leave blank to use command's original name)
edit.iconDescription: Lucide name (e.g., file-text) or .svg path; click "Select SVG"

edit.title: Edit note
edit.pathDescription: Vault path to the Markdown note (e.g. Folder/Note.md).
edit.displayDescription: Label in the menu (leave blank to use the file name)
edit.iconDescription: Lucide name (default: file) or .svg path; click "Select SVG"

plugin.noGroupsYet: Create a group in Ribbon Folder settings first.

svgIcon.emptyState: No .svg files in icon folder. You can place icons in this directory or use Lucide icon names directly (e.g., dice).
